name: @intentsolutionsio/crypto-news-aggregator
description: Aggregate and analyze crypto news from multiple sources with sentiment analysis

scripts.postinstall: node -e "console.log(\"\\n→ This npm package is a tracking/proof artifact. Install the plugin via:\\n  ccpi install crypto-news-aggregator\\n  or /plugin install crypto-news-aggregator@claude-code-plugins-plus in Claude Code\\n\")"
